title: campylospermum sumatranum
intro: Campylospermum sumatranum, also known as the Sumatran camphor tree or Sumatran candle tree, is a species of plant in the family Ochnaceae, native to the island of Sumatra in Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to its camphor-rich resin. The health benefits of Campylospermum sumatranum include relief from fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
